title: Blue The Pack
description: This is texture pack for crystal pvp made by Noklu
body:
>  A **Crystal PvP** Texture pack made by **Noklu**
>   The pack is simple and easy to use. You just need to download the pack, go to your minecraft and put it in your resource pack folder, select the pack and enjoy! 
>  This pack works for java only so sorry bedrock players this pack will not work for you. 
> 
>  This resource pack sadly only works for **1.21** for now...
> 
>  If you want to see pictures of the pack you can go check the gallery 
>  **Made by: Noklu**
